changes.text: - If it has any languages, add Sussuran.

- If the creature is 8th level or higher, give it a fly Speed of 25 feet. If its level is lower than that, you can give it this fly Speed if it either doesn't have ranged attacks or you remove its ranged attacks; use discretion.

selection.description: - If the creature can cast spells, you can replace spells with air spells of the same rank, such as: **Cantrip** *gale blast*, **1st** *gust of wind*, **2nd** *cleanse air*, **3rd** *wall of wind*, **4th** *fly*, **5th** *pressure zone*, **6th** *phantom orchestra*, **7th** *fly*, **8th** *whirlwind*, **9th** *wrathful storm*.

changes.text: - If the creature can cast spells, you can replace spells with air spells of the same rank, such as: **Cantrip** *gale blast*, **1st** *gust of wind*, **2nd** *cleanse air*, **3rd** *wall of wind*, **4th** *fly*, **5th** *pressure zone*, **6th** *phantom orchestra*, **7th** *fly*, **8th** *whirlwind*, **9th** *wrathful storm*.

name: Air
text: To quickly give a creature a magical connection to the element of air, you can use the following adjustments.
